name: Honey Heist
hook: You are criminal bears pulling off the greatest honey heist the world has ever seen. Two stats: BEAR and CRIMINAL. Things will go wrong.
like: If you enjoyed Ocean's Eleven or love the chaos of party games like Exploding Kittens, this one's for you.

name: Dungeons & Dragons 5e
hook: The world's most popular tabletop RPG. Create a hero, team up with allies, and explore dungeons full of monsters, traps, and treasure.
like: If you enjoy Lord of the Rings, Baldur's Gate 3, or building characters with deep customization options.
components: Needs: Full polyhedral dice set (d4–d20), character sheets

name: Call of Cthulhu
hook: Investigate cosmic horrors in the 1920s. Your characters are fragile, sanity is fleeting, and the truth is worse than you imagined.
like: If you're a fan of H.P. Lovecraft, Sherlock Holmes, or slow-burn horror like Hereditary.

name: Blades in the Dark
hook: Play a crew of daring scoundrels in a haunted industrial-fantasy city. Plan heists, deal with factions, and embrace the chaos.
like: If you love Peaky Blinders, Dishonored, or the idea of playing antiheroes in a gritty world.
components: Needs: D6 pool (6–8 dice), crew/character sheets

name: Mothership
hook: Survive the horrors of space. A sci-fi horror RPG where your stress builds, your ship falls apart, and no one can hear you scream.
like: If you're into Alien, Dead Space, or Event Horizon and want that dread at the table.

name: Fiasco
hook: A GM-less game about powerful ambition and poor impulse control. Create a Coen Brothers-style story where everything spirals out of control.
like: If you enjoy Fargo, Burn After Reading, or improv comedy where plans go spectacularly wrong.
components: Needs: Playset cards (or classic: 4d6 per player)
